text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I've been having this scary dream recently... I'm
surrounded by black shadows, and they're all
speaking to me in a language I don't know...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I keep having it... so now, I'm afraid to sleep... Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems to be really struggling. I wish I could
do something to help.
